overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk along a futuristic waterfront promenade. The player moves from an elevated walkway through a covered outdoor seating area to an open waterfront with palm trees, modern skyscrapers, and pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with metal railings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along an elevated pedestrian walkway with metal railings, passing benches and palm trees

notable_agents.action: person in white clothing walking past the camera in the opposite direction

entered.detail: silver metal safety railing along the walkway edge with horizontal bars
large industrial building with red facade and concrete stairs on the side
tall modern glass office tower with grid pattern dominating the skyline
tropical palm trees lining the walkway casting shadows
green and wood benches placed along the railing

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk along an elevated pedestrian walkway on a sunny day. Metal railings line the left side while a large red building stands on the right. Palm trees and a distant glass skyscraper dominate the view ahead. A pedestrian in white passes by in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered outdoor seating area of Cirkus bar

events.description: enters covered outdoor seating area of the Cirkus establishment
exits the covered area back into bright direct sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered outdoor seating area, passing between tables and chairs

entered.detail: large red and blue signage with white text reading Cirkus mounted on the building
round black tables with matching chairs arranged for outdoor dining
bright purple neon graffiti art of a samurai with Japanese text on concrete wall
gray concrete wall with graffiti tags separating the seating area

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a semi-covered outdoor seating area of the Cirkus bar, where tables and chairs line the right side under a roof. A striking purple neon samurai graffiti artwork illuminates the back wall. The lighting shifts to mixed shadows before emerging back into bright sunlight as the waterfront becomes visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront promenade with bay views

events.description: emerges onto open waterfront promenade with expansive view of the bay

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront promenade, passing pedestrians and people sitting on the concrete steps by the water

notable_agents.action: person sitting on concrete steps looking out at the water
person with bright pink hair carrying a brown bag walking ahead

entered.detail: expansive view of the bay with hazy distant buildings across the water
calm greenish water of the bay lapping against the concrete edge
wide concrete steps with red painted edge leading down to the water
large digital billboards displaying advertisements on the building ahead
wide concrete stairs with metal railings leading up to upper level

segments.scene_description: The scene opens onto a bright waterfront promenade with the bay visible on the left. People sit on concrete steps leading down to the water while others walk along the path. The camera passes a person with pink hair and continues toward a large building covered in digital billboards, with palm trees and a stair structure on the right side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from an elevated urban walkway into a vibrant, open-air waterfront promenade. It begins with a walk along a sunny pedestrian path flanked by metal railings and a large red building, moving toward distant glass skyscrapers and palm trees. As the camera progresses, it enters the semi-covered seating area of the Cirkus bar, where the bright daylight shifts into mixed shadows illuminated by purple neon samurai graffiti on the back wall. The scene then opens back into brilliant sunlight as the camera emerges from the shelter and expands onto a wide promenade overlooking a bay. Finally, the view passes pedestrians on concrete steps and a person with pink hair, continuing toward a massive building adorned with digital billboards.
